allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "e:\\xampp\\htdocs\\New\\FYP-EASE-Sarawak\\easesarawak" -Force | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if \($_.PSIsContainer\) {"Folder"} else {"File"}}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
Bash("e:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root easesarawak -e "ALTER TABLE \\`order\\` ADD COLUMN \\`comment\\` TEXT NULL AFTER \\`modified_by\\`;")
Bash("e:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root easesarawak -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM \\`order\\` LIKE 'comment';")
Bash("e:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root easesarawak -e "SHOW COLUMNS FROM message;")
Bash("e:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root easesarawak -e "SELECT order_id, service_type, order_details_json FROM \\`order\\` WHERE order_id IN \(1, 15, 16, 18\);")

Bash("e:\\xampp\\mysql\\bin\\mysql.exe" -u root easesarawak -e "SELECT order_id, JSON_UNQUOTE\(JSON_EXTRACT\(order_details_json, '$.\\"Origin Location\\"'\)\) as origin_loc, JSON_UNQUOTE\(JSON_EXTRACT\(order_details_json, '$.\\"Destination Location\\"'\)\) as dest_loc FROM \\`order\\` WHERE order_id IN \(15, 16, 18\);")
